data.current_summary: Search for visually similar products using an image
data.description_suggestion: Performs visual search to find products similar to the provided image. Accepts image input (file upload or URL) and returns a ranked list of matching products from the catalog with similarity scores. Supports filtering by product attributes. No state changes occur.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about input format (file/URL), output structure (ranked list with scores), filtering capabilities, and clarified that this is a read-only operation for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Search globally for visually similar products
data.description_suggestion: Performs global visual search across all available catalogs to find visually similar products. data.description_suggestion: Creates a subscription for price or availability alerts on specified products. Requires AlertSubscribeRequest with product identifiers and alert preferences.
